title: Genuine Structured Policy
purpose: Test whether a C estimator that actively uses structured features (probe_family) improves decision utility over B1 on frozen populations under the C-1 asymmetric-cost protocol.

decision_rule.rule_verbatim: C_genuine(obs_fails, n_obs, obs_records) = ACCEPT if obs_fails == 0; ACCEPT if obs_fails > 0 AND all failures share one probe_family; REJECT otherwise.
decision_rule.rule_pseudocode: if obs_records is None: return 'ACCEPT' if obs_fails == 0 else 'REJECT'; failures = [r for r in obs_records if not r['pass_fail']]; if len(failures) == 0: return 'ACCEPT'; families = {r['fingerprint_context']['probe_family'] for r in failures}; if len(families) == 1: return 'ACCEPT'; return 'REJECT'
decision_rule.fallback_when_obs_records_none: ACCEPT if obs_fails == 0, REJECT otherwise (B1 behavior)
decision_rule.differs_from_fail_count_policy: Adds the 'all failures in one probe_family' ACCEPT branch. When obs_records is provided and obs_fails > 0, C_genuine can differ from B1.

falsification_criterion.PASS: exists lambda in sweep such that utility(C_genuine) - utility(B1) > delta on LC322 (primary), AND C_genuine produces different per-solver decisions than B1 on at least one solver on LC322 (D > 0)
falsification_criterion.FAIL: no such lambda found, OR D = 0 (C_genuine collapses to B1 behavior despite the genuine policy)
falsification_criterion.DEGENERATE: C_genuine or B1 collapses to all-ACCEPT or all-REJECT at a given lambda; record and exclude at that lambda
falsification_criterion.LC45_role: stress_test only; LC45 result reported separately; does not override LC322 verdict

three_case_report.FULL_EQUIVALENCE: D = 0; C_genuine is operationally B1; FAIL
three_case_report.MASKED_DIVERGENCE: D > 0, A = 0; structural difference does not produce cost difference; FAIL (utility gap is 0)
three_case_report.DIRECTIONAL_SUPERIORITY: D > 0, A > 0; structural difference produces cost difference; PASS or FAIL based on utility gap criterion

aggregate_consistency_check.check: Re-run B1 on each population; recomputed (WA, WR) must equal stored (WA, WR) in data/midweather_fingerprint_lc{322,45}.json
aggregate_consistency_check.on_failure: STOP IMMEDIATELY. Do not record any result. Surface discrepancy to Foued.
